title: Marketplace Manager - EaseMyTrip Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - EaseMyTrip Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip Holdings Services family as a Marketplace Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip Holdings Services:
EaseMyTrip Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip Holdings Services!
